fields.name: 任務層級
fields.purpose: Records whether the task is a parent task, child task, side task, evidence-only record, promotion candidate, or promoted source.

fields.name: 阻擋母任務完成
fields.purpose: Marks whether this child task gates parent completion.

fields.name: 階層判斷狀態
fields.purpose: Records the current hierarchy judgment result.

fields.name: 升級來源任務
fields.purpose: On a newly promoted parent task, links to the original child task that caused promotion.

fields.name: 升級後主任務
fields.purpose: On the original child task, links forward to the new parent task created by promotion.

fields.name: 升級原因
fields.purpose: Explains why a child task became a parent task or promotion candidate.

fields.name: 事件線識別
fields.purpose: Stores a stable event-line key for grouping parent, child, side, and promotion records.

fields.name: 完成門檻
fields.purpose: Defines what must be true before this task can close.

fields.name: 相關任務
fields.purpose: Links side tasks or sibling tasks that are related but do not gate parent completion.

fields.name: 副任務類型
fields.purpose: Classifies side tasks without treating them as blocking child tasks.

fields.name: 階層判斷時間
fields.purpose: Records when AM last judged the task hierarchy.
